## Meeting Purpose

[Review the 12-week AI visibility engagement retro.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Retro Confirms Rapid Progress:** The 12-week retro validates the strategy, showing a new site achieved its first AI citation in just 5 weeks and 20 high-impact wins to date.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Long-Form Content Outperforms:** Long-form articles are outperforming "fan outposts," though the latter will not be cut yet.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [**Backlinks Are the Next Priority:** Victoria will support the backlink acquisition motion to accelerate Domain Authority (DA) growth.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**New Dashboard Coming:** A dynamic Notion dashboard is being built to centralize all metrics from the retro for easy, week-over-week tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

## Topics

### Engagement Retro Review

  - [GrowthX presented a 12-week engagement retro to document progress and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build a credible AI source to influence RAMP.com's AI visibility score.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Key Milestones:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [**Week 1:** Site live, first articles published](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [**Week 5:** First AI citation](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [**Week 12:** Domain Authority (DA) improvement begins](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Wins:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [The retro documents 20 high-impact wins, categorized by model (e.g., ChatGPT) and prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [Each win is annotated to distinguish between direct citations, feature mentions, and verbatim content use.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [This provides crucial context, as not all citations have equal value.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Long-Form vs. Fan Outposts:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [Long-form articles are currently outperforming fan outposts.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [Fan outposts will not be cut yet, pending more data.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [**Citation Speed Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [The retro includes prompts and Scrunch links for articles cited quickly after publication.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**YouTube Integration:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [George will explore ways to better integrate the YouTube channel with the new site, beyond the current practice of creating videos for articles.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)

### Future Focus: Acceleration

  - [**Backlinks:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [Identified as the top priority to accelerate DA growth.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [Victoria will support this motion; GrowthX has a network of high-DA domains for outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**Content Volume:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [Victoria stressed the importance of continuing to increase the number of articles published.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [**New Experiments:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [George will propose new tests (e.g., newsletter) to accelerate results.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
      - [Propose new experiments (e.g., newsletter) to accelerate results.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [Build a dynamic Notion dashboard to track all retro metrics week-over-week.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**Victoria:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
      - [Support the backlink acquisition motion.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [Continue increasing content volume to drive more AI citations.](https://fathom.video/share/v73UM9Gsp8wfBuP4zssHQFbhzhmBvQZ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
